title: Mapping Ledger
description: Shape of ledger/mapping.yaml — the durable, drop-independent column→target mapping decisions. Keyed by source table + column (never row position), so it re-applies automatically across drops. See plan §4.1 and 01-operating-model.md §1.

tables.description: One mapping block per source table.

target_entity.description: Primary Everspot entity rows of this table become.

secondary_entities.description: Additional entities a single source row also produces (e.g. a BURIALS row yields both a customer (the decedent) and an interment).

reference_resolution.description: Value-set → real tenant list_option ID resolutions for fields on this table (resolved against the Wave-0 tenant snapshot).

action.description: How this column is consumed: map=1:1 to a target field; split_name=one cell → multiple name parts; value_map=coded value → target value (see value_sets.yaml); derive=computed from one/more columns; external_id=this column IS the source key feeding external_id; unmapped=intentionally ignored.

target.description: Single target field. Used by action=map and action=value_map.

targets.description: Multiple target fields. Used by action=split_name (and action=derive when it fans out).

transform.description: Cleansing primitive applied (e.g. parse_name, normalize_phone, normalize_date, to_cents). Null for pass-through.

transform_version.description: VERSION of the transform script that produced cached cells — feeds version-aware memoization (01-operating-model.md §5.2).

value_set_ref.description: For action=value_map: the value-set key in value_sets.yaml (e.g. MASTER_OWNERS.STAT) holding the per-value translation.

derivation.description: For action=derive: human/spec description of how the value is computed.

confidence.description: Mapping-agent confidence in this column decision.

field.description: Target field whose value is a tenant reference ID (e.g. suffix_id, cemetery_id).

via.description: Tenant resource the ID comes from.

type.description: For via=list_options, the list_option type (e.g. name_suffix). Otherwise the resource subtype/category.

resolved.description: source value → real tenant ID resolved from the Wave-0 snapshot.

missing.description: Source values with no matching tenant record yet — drive Wave-0b reference creation / Gate-1 questions.
